name: Role Guard
description: Deterministic role enforcement — blocks file writes for coordinator agents, escalates violations to Governor.

agents.description: Agent IDs to guard — typically your coordinator agents (default: ["main"])

opsAgent.description: Name/ID of the agent that handles quick ops tasks — shown in block messages (e.g. "larry")

projectAgent.description: Name/ID of the agent that handles project/feature work — shown in block messages (e.g. "pm")
